Conditions A to Z
Dementia 
This guide has information for people with dementia and their families and friends.
Top tasks in Dementia 
Sign up for dementia emails
About dementia
Find out what dementia is, including what causes it, if it can be prevented and how it's treated
Symptoms and diagnosis
Find out about the main symptoms of dementia, how to get diagnosed and what to do if you've been diagnosed
Living with dementia
Advice about how to live well with dementia, including information if you look after someone with dementia
Care and support
Information about care homes, NHS care, social services, financial support and legal issues
More help and support 
Become a "Dementia Friend"
www.dementiafriends.org.uk 
Talk to an Admiral Nurse at Dementia UK
www.dementiauk.org 
Share your story in the Alzheimer's Society Dementia Support Forum
forum.alzheimers.org.uk 
Volunteer for a study at Join Dementia Research
www.joindementiaresearch.nihr.ac.uk
